'''Z. Limmer''' was the chief financial officer of [[Ororo Transportation/Legends|Ororo Transportation]], a thin, short, and nervous man.

In [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]] with [[Tuyay]] and [[Dellis Yuls]], he claimed to [[Guri]] that Ororo would not presume to contend with [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] nor tread in Prince [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor's]] territory.

Tuyay then shouted angrily that he was unwilling to "play doormat" or him any more, and that they were going to keep all [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] they gain.

Hearing this from his colleague, Limmer tried to soften his words, before stopped by Tuyay.

Suddenly Guri jumped behind them and threw him at the two [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] guards.
Dellis Yuls pulled a small blaster but Guri broke his hand. Limmer tried to stand, but then she speared his throat with her fingertips. She later shot him in the head in order to make sure he was really [[Death/Legends|dead]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] {{1st|in book}}
